entries.definition:
ʾ–s–s beginning, root, foundation, to found. Of this root, أَسَّسَ
ʾassasa occurs twice in the Qur’an.

أَسَّسَ ʾassasa [v. II trans.] to found, to establish, to base
(9:109) أَفَمَنْ أَسَّسَ بُنْيَانَهُ عَلَى تَقْوَى مِّنَ اللَّهِ وَرِضْوَانٍ خَيْرٌ أَمْ مَنْ أَسَّسَ بُنْيَانَهُ عَلَى
شَفَا جُرُفٍ هَارٍ is he who founds his building on consciousness of
God and desire for His good pleasure better, or the one who
founds his building on the brink of a crumbling precipice?
